titleStmt.title: SII 36.271: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 271. (A.R. No. 271 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall base of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: The inscription is incomplete and contains an unfinished historical introduction of Vīrarājēndra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiruvaḷartiraḷpuyat tirunilavalaiyam ta
n maṇippūṇenat tāṅkip panmaṇi koṟṟa veṇ
kuṭai niḻaṟ kuvalaiyattuyirkaḷaip peṟṟatāyinum peṇi ma
ṟṟai Aṟaikaḻalaraicar tannaṭi niḻalotuṅka muṟaimaiyil
Arum peṟṟamaiya nāḷ van=tāṉai Irumpuvi nikaḻ Irājātirāja
nenṟoḷi maṇi neṭumuṭi cūṭṭi tanṟuṇait tampiyar taniveṟcana
vallavanai vampiyalalaḻaṅkal matipurai kavitai maturān=takaṉai vā
ḷentutānaic coḷen=tiranenṟu niraimuṭi Eṇṭicai tikaḻa Icai
peṟac cūṭṭit toṇṭai maṇṭalaṅ kuṭuttaruḷi tiṇṭiṟaṟ pāravaruḷ
putalvaruḷ rājen=tiracoḻaṉaiyeḻiyār yānai coḻapāṇṭiyane
Āṇṭakai Irumaṭi coḻaṉaip perumaiyum mellān=tannoṭu pokkavai
ttaruḷip pinnaruñ cun=tara cēranuñ coḻa keraḷanum menṟan=tamil peruṅkuṇatta
raiciyaṟkuriya main=tarai maṇi muṭi cūṭṭit taṉ kiḷai Ēvavvārulakattu pavvārkkuriya
pukaliṭam veṟu veṟaruḷip pukarmuka kaṭakkāṟṟukaitta kaḻakkāṟ caḷukkiyai muṭakka
ṟṟuṭaip puṟaṅkaṇṭu paṭaittoḻil peritoṭu malaikkum vikkalanṟannoṭu va
ricilait taṭakkai mācāman=tarai kaṅka pāṭik kaḷattiṭai ninṟu tuṅkapattirai
pukat turatti Aṅkavar veṅkai nannāṭṭiṭai mīṇṭavar viṭṭa tāṅkarum peru
valit taṇkeṭat tākki mātaṇṭanāyakan cāmuṇṭarācaṉaic ceṟṟavan cirattaṉai
Aṟuttu maṟṟavanarumakaḷākiya Irukaiyanṟevi nākalai Enṟu tokaiyañ cāya
yalai mukattoṭu mūkku veṟākki vikaccupuk katirmaṇip parutiyuṅ katapparit tokutiyu
Digital edition of SII 36.271 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
